ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlistGo/alist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlistGo/alist
Language: go
🗂️A file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storages, powered by Gin and Solidjs. / 一个支持多存储的文件列表/WebDAV程序，使用 Gin 和 Solidjs。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asheshgoplani/agent-deck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asheshgoplani/agent-deck
Language: go
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/go-ethereum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum
Language: go
Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goravel/goravel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goravel/goravel
Language: go
The full-featured Golang Development Framework skeleton

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gruntwork-io/terragrunt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt
Language: go
Terragrunt is a flexible orchestration tool that allows Infrastructure as Code written in OpenTofu/Terraform to scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kopia/kopia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kopia/kopia
Language: go
Cross-platform backup tool for Windows, macOS & Linux with fast, incremental backups, client-side end-to-end encryption, compression and data deduplication. CLI and GUI included.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
Language: go
Every API has a secret identity. This finds it, absorbs every feature from every competing tool, then builds the GOAT CLI — designed for AI agents first, with SQLite sync, offline search, and compound insight commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/printing-press-library
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library
Language: go
Official library of CLIs generated by the CLI Printing Press. Endorsed, tested, and community-contributed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: passteque/gluetun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/passteque/gluetun
Language: go
VPN client in a thin Docker container for multiple VPN providers, written in Go, and using OpenVPN or Wireguard, DNS over TLS, with a few proxy servers built-in.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocketbase/pocketbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocketbase/pocketbase
Language: go
Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rclone/rclone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rclone/rclone
Language: go
"rsync for cloud storage" - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terrastruct/d2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terrastruct/d2
Language: go
D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usememos/memos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usememos/memos
Language: go
Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.
